testsuite.name: Checking Search widget when perform search

testcase.name: Checking Search widget when perform search should open PDP page of a printer
testcase.classname: should open PDP page of a printer

testcase.name: Checking Search widget when perform search should open Learn More page of a printer
testcase.classname: should open Learn More page of a printer

testcase.name: Checking Search widget when perform search should open suggestion to open PLP page and close Search field
testcase.classname: should open suggestion to open PLP page and close Search field
